digest.greeting: Good evening, Jean. Today closed several dashboard items across JuniperLab, Amazon Connect, Project Coordinator handoff, Legal Change Management, and intake triage. A few risk and follow-up threads still need tomorrow's attention, especially LevelPath readiness and the urgent detention-tracker question.

items.label: Sent the JuniperLab follow-up
items.detail: The JuniperLab email reminder is marked complete in the dashboard.

items.label: Resolved the Amazon Connect noon overlap
items.detail: The Amazon Connect overlap item is marked complete after carrying as one of the day's urgent schedule decisions.

items.label: Moved the Project Coordinator handoff discussion forward
items.detail: The Project Coordinator handoff item with Sara and Janet is marked complete in the dashboard.

items.label: Handled the Legal Change Management walkthrough follow-up
items.detail: The walkthrough-forwarding item is marked complete after appearing in both the action list and email follow-up list.

items.label: Triaged the new Court and Legal Clerks intake alerts
items.detail: The intake-alert triage item is marked complete in the dashboard.

items.label: Track LevelPath UAT and SSO readiness before go-live
items.detail: LevelPath remains the highest-risk open item. UAT has moved forward, go-live is still targeted for July 24, and production SSO still needs confirmation before the path is fully clear.

items.label: Answer Hassan's urgent detention-tracker question
items.detail: Hassan asked in Teams whether there are any other detention trackers in Excel or Forms beyond the known detained-at-BIOs and denied-entry trackers. This came through as an unread urgent Teams notification email late today.

items.label: Follow up with Katie about the missing File Release project
items.detail: Clarify why the File Release project is not showing and what Katie needs next.

items.label: Lock next steps from the Jhara and Mental Health meetings
items.detail: Carry forward any owners, milestones, or blockers that still need to be captured from Jhara's portfolio roadblocks discussion and the Mental Health project meeting.

items.label: Capture project implications from attorney-client privilege training
items.detail: Capture any process, documentation, or communication changes from yesterday's attorney-client privilege training that affect Legal Change Management, CoE, or portfolio work.

items.label: Review Lucia's urgent client notifications SOP
items.detail: Lucia sent a work-in-progress urgent client notifications SOP and asked for Jean's thoughts on how to proceed.

items.label: Review the SaltClick 2026 forecast risk
items.detail: Nadia flagged that the forecast is largely hours-based and may not reflect actual effort. Watch for Ashley's revised version and be ready to review assumptions, scope, funding implications, and 2027 support versus internal ownership.

items.label: Clarify USCIS backend scope versus operational launch
items.detail: Yuri clarified that backend changes may benefit USCIS Expedite later, but full operational initiation has not been authorized. Keep BCP/Incident Response and Salesforce stakeholders aligned so this does not get read as a broader project restart.

items.label: Review the external Financial Controller candidate email
items.detail: Boutique Recruiting followed up directly with Jean about a Financial Controller candidate. Reply only if the hiring need is still active; otherwise park it below the project-critical items.

items.label: Complete Laura Urena's 90-day touchpoint
items.detail: Rippling assigned Jean a 90-day touchpoint review for Laura Urena today.

items.label: Legal Change Management - IT & EPMO Sync
items.detail: Recurring alignment for EPMO and IT SharePoint questions. Good place to confirm repository, intake form, and walkthrough readiness.

items.label: EPMO EOW Check In
items.detail: Moved earlier and includes Nadia for programmatic updates. Bring LevelPath, SaltClick forecast, PC handoff, and intake-prioritization status.

items.label: Salesforce Program Standup
items.detail: Nadia's standup focuses on milestones, project health, risks, dependencies, and decisions blocking delivery.

items.label: Project pipeline and Executive Project Status Slide Update
items.detail: Pipeline sync, executive slide update, and 7/29 EPMO planning create a compressed afternoon; prepare the leadership-ready updates before lunch.
